item.title: Inside Abandoned Sea Forts
item.description: This video explores abandoned sea forts, examining their construction, historical purpose, and the reasons they were eventually left unused. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: Inside Abandoned Sea Forts
media:content.media:description: This video explores abandoned sea forts, examining their construction, historical purpose, and the reasons they were eventually left unused. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: Foreshore Finds with Nicola White Tideline Art
item.description: This video follows a mudlarking adventure along the foreshore, uncovering a range of historical objects and exploring the stories behind each discovery. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: Foreshore Finds with Nicola White Tideline Art
media:content.media:description: This video follows a mudlarking adventure along the foreshore, uncovering a range of historical objects and exploring the stories behind each discovery. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: A 17th-Century Trading Token Find
item.description: This video highlights a small but significant mudlarking discovery: a 17th-century trading token, exploring its history, use in commerce, and what it reveals about past economies. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: A 17th-Century Trading Token Find
media:content.media:description: This video highlights a small but significant mudlarking discovery: a 17th-century trading token, exploring its history, use in commerce, and what it reveals about past economies. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: Curious Finds With Unique Origins
item.description: This video explores multiple mudlarking discoveries with unusual and uncertain origins, examining their possible uses, historical context, and what they reveal about the past. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: Curious Finds With Unique Origins
media:content.media:description: This video explores multiple mudlarking discoveries with unusual and uncertain origins, examining their possible uses, historical context, and what they reveal about the past. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: Nicola White Tideline Art Finds a Gold Ring
item.description: This video captures a surprising mudlarking discovery along the river, where a gold ring is uncovered and examined for its possible history and origin. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: Nicola White Tideline Art Finds a Gold Ring
media:content.media:description: This video captures a surprising mudlarking discovery along the river, where a gold ring is uncovered and examined for its possible history and origin. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: Finding a Tudor Artefact in the Thames
item.description: This video follows a Thames mudlarking discovery, where a possible Tudor-era artefact is uncovered and examined for its historical significance and origin. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: Finding a Tudor Artefact in the Thames
media:content.media:description: This video follows a Thames mudlarking discovery, where a possible Tudor-era artefact is uncovered and examined for its historical significance and origin. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: The Thames Takes Us Back in Time
item.description: This video follows a mudlarking discovery along the River Thames, uncovering historical objects that offer a glimpse into life from past centuries. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: The Thames Takes Us Back in Time
media:content.media:description: This video follows a mudlarking discovery along the River Thames, uncovering historical objects that offer a glimpse into life from past centuries. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames
